# The Patch

> Independent journalism on the Juridical Singularity, the World Succession Deed 1400/98, treaty chains, sovereignty, and AI support — a world without unilateral power.

The Patch publishes primary-source reporting on international law, NATO infrastructure (Kreuzbergkaserne, Zweibrücken), state succession, and the post-national legal order emerging from the Juridical Singularity.

## Pages

- [Home](/): Latest dispatches and an overview of The Patch.
- [Blog](/blog): Every article, synced live from WordPress.
- [Pages](/pages): Editorial pages on Electric Technocracy and the Juridical Singularity.
- [Search](/search): Static search across every article and page.

## Optional

- [RSS Feed](/feed.xml)
- [Sitemap](/sitemap.xml)
